summary: After the gaming company Quincy revolutionized the streaming industry through their immersive 'Cube' technology, Kang Hyunwoo, also known as 'Meleegod,' launches his first stream under the handle 'Alley Boss.' Despite his low level of 50, he successfully challenges the Colosseum, gaining a massive following and numerous donations from viewers. To keep his content engaging, he begins accepting missions from his chat, including a request to fight an opponent using only his bare fists, which he executes with skill.
key_moments: Quincy introduces the 'Cube' streaming feature, revolutionizing the industry.
Kang Hyunwoo launches his first stream as 'Alley Boss' and begins a 100-win Colosseum challenge.
Professional coaches recognize Kang Hyunwoo's identity as the elusive 'Meleegod'.
Alley Boss accepts a mission to fight a Level 70 opponent using only his bare fists.
